title: The Underworld Stirs
description: On pages 11–13, this part follows Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Jinbe as Elbaf’s school, underworld, and giant society fall into crisis as children, giants, and the Straw Hats react to dangerous forces moving beneath the island.
scene: Elbaf’s school, underworld, and giant society fall into crisis as children, giants, and the Straw Hats react to dangerous forces moving beneath the island.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Thank goodness you fire- fighters are here!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: The kids're headin' straight for the flames!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We're using the highest water pressure the valve can handle!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Look, gunko!! The kids are about to burn alive!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Would that be enough to wake 'em up?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yes, they'll wake up from the heat, screaming for their parents in terror.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Then the flames will burn them down to the bone.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Did I make it in time?!

summary: This part advances the Elbaf Crisis through 28 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
